name: Airbus SE
lede: Airbus runs seven capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Vadodara and New Delhi, covering CoE, engineering & design, gcc/gic, manufacturing and ssc, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Airbus office in India. We map seven, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Airbus SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Airbus runs 7 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Vadodara, New Delhi), covering CoE, engineering & design, gcc/gic, manufacturing and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: President and MD Airbus India and South Asia

about.description: Airbus's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Vadodara and New Delhi, spanning CoE, engineering & design, gcc/gic, manufacturing and ssc. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Aerospace Products and Parts, Aerospace Components Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 35 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Airbus operate in India?
faq.a: Airbus operates 7 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Airbus have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Airbus's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Vadodara and New Delhi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Airbus run in India?
faq.a: Airbus runs CoE, engineering & design, gcc/gic, manufacturing and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Airbus's India GCCs?
faq.a: Airbus's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Airbus's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 35 leaders at Airbus's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
